focusItems.text: P0: one clean pass on the presentation deck
P1: update the reading notes and clip 3 takeaways
P2: keep side quests in parking lot until evening

backgroundRuns: Collect references for the next project direction
Keep a lightweight inbox of ideas instead of switching tasks

persistentSection.title: Life goal / north star
items: Ship one meaningful thing each week

state.newEvent: Demo data only — replace with your own state locally.
state.delayedItem: Non-urgent tasks stay parked until the main deliverable is done.
state.moveTomorrow: Review what slipped, then re-plan with fresh priorities tomorrow.
state.parkingLot: Inbox zero is not the goal. Keep extra ideas here.
state.dailyReview: Did today stay focused on the highest-leverage work?

meta.note: This repository ships with sanitized sample data only.

monthPlans.2026-01-15: Ship a shareable planner demo and keep the system easy to edit.

weeklyPlans.2026-01-12: Protect deep work, keep background items visible, and review daily.
